description: Style NoteThe English brand gets it right with these understated denims. This pair of french connection jeans adds a distinct personality to your off-duty staples. Get the casual yet dressy look just right with this pair. Wear this with that edgy tee, under a neutral jacket (with boat shoes). A monochrome or a printed tee is the right choice for a pared down look.Product DetailsLight grey jeans with a washed look, has a button and zipper closure in the front, two insert pockets at the right front and one at the left, two patch pockets at the back and loops at the waistband Material and care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
